phrases.text_local: La cathédrale est dans quelle direction ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah kah-tay-DRAL eh don kel dee-rec-SYON
phrases.cultural_note: The cathedral towers are visible from most of the centre — they serve as a natural landmark for orientation.

responses.english: The cathedral is right there, on the right.
responses.phonetic: lah kah-tay-DRAHL ay / ay DAHN kehl dee-rek-SYOHN
responses.french: Bonjour, la cathédrale est juste là, à droite.

phrases.intent_en: Which champagne house do you recommend for a first-timer?
phrases.text_local: Quelle maison de champagne recommandez-vous pour un débutant ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel may-ZON duh shom-PAH-nyuh ruh-koh-mon-DAY voo poor un day-bew-TON
phrases.cultural_note: For first-timers, Mumm is accessible and central. Taittinger has the most spectacular historical cellars. Pommery is best for art lovers.

responses.english: I recommend the House of Mumm, it is central and accessible.
responses.phonetic: KEL meh-ZON duh sham-PAN yuh-kuh-mahn-DEV-voo poor uh PRUH-myeh vee-zee-TUR
responses.french: Je recommande la maison Mumm, elle est centrale et accessible.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cathedral is from here
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la cathédrale depuis ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah kah-tay-DRAL duh-PWEE ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Reims Cathedral, where French kings were crowned for centuries, is the city's defining landmark.

responses.english: Five minutes on foot to the north-east.
responses.phonetic: ah SANK mee-NOOT ah PYAY vair luh nor-EST.
responses.french: À cinq minutes à pied vers le nord-est.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main shopping street is
phrases.text_local: Où est la principale rue commerçante ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo ay lah pran-see-PAL roo koh-mair-SAHNT

responses.english: Rue de Vesle, at the heart of the city centre.
responses.phonetic: lah ROO duh VESL, oh KUR doo SAHN-truh veel.
responses.french: La rue de Vesle, au cœur du centre-ville.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus goes to the champagne cellars
phrases.text_local: Quel bus mène aux caves de champagne ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel boos men oh kahv duh shahm-PAN-yuh

responses.english: Line two, Mumm or Pommery cellar stop.
responses.phonetic: lah LEEN-yuh DUH, ah-RAY kahv moom oo poh-muh-REE.
responses.french: La ligne deux, arrêt Cave Mumm ou Pommery.
